textPlain: i'd love this for the iPad, i'd buy it right away but didnt see it for the iPad  --  mostly because writing with a mouse is very difficult, but pens are easy

And I'd love to make it for iPads too, just struggling to find the optimal UX for enabling and disabling the overlay.On macOS you can just use the global hotkey or the app menu, on iPad I'd have to wire it up somehow else - supper happy to get ideas on what would feel seamless and unobtrusive for you. I'll definitely implement it then!
